sarah_m.name: Sarah M.
sarah_m.text: MyHigh5 changed my life! I won 3 beauty contests and earned over $5,000 through the affiliate program.

carlos_r.name: Carlos R.
carlos_r.text: The voting system is revolutionary. Fair, transparent and really fun to use!

emma_l.name: Emma L.
emma_l.text: Amazing global community. I made friends from all continents and discovered incredible talents.
